b. Add leafy greens.

a. Prioritize deep sleep.
b. Enjoy fresh fruit.

a. Eat more fiber.
b. Drink plenty of water.
II. Diet
a. Get enough protein.
b. Add leafy greens.
III. Wellness
a. Prioritize deep sleep.
b. Enjoy fresh fruit.
